title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Kuehne+Nagel India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Kuehne+Nagel India
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!
